data.title: TEST: Archive
data.content:
<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Blog Archive - Full Content","description":"Blog archive with all features enabled: filters, search, per-page selector, load-more pagination. Tests the full blog experience with category-based accent colors."} -->

Connect with one of our staff members.","buttons":[{"title":"Explore More Student Voices","url":"#"}],"displayFilters":true,"displaySearch":true,"displayPerPage":true,"postsPerPage":9,"maxColumns":3,"paginationMode":"load-more"} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Team Members Archive - Full Content","description":"Team members grid with department filter, per-page selector, and CTA button. Tests accent-color card backgrounds, photo from meta, name from first_name+last_name."} -->

From career success to wellness, we're ready to support you.","buttons":[{"title":"Learn More","url":"#"}],"displayFilters":true,"displaySearch":false,"displayPerPage":true,"postsPerPage":9,"maxColumns":3,"paginationMode":"load-more"} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Resources Archive - Full Content","description":"Resources grid with audience and resource type filters. Tests dark card with accent hover transition, taxonomy tag pills, excerpt display."} -->

From career success to wellness, we're ready to support you.","displayFilters":true,"displaySearch":false,"displayPerPage":true,"postsPerPage":9,"maxColumns":3,"paginationMode":"load-more"} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Testimonials Archive - Minimal","description":"Testimonials without filters, search, or per-page controls. Tests private CPT rendering with no links, blockquote display."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/archive {"blockVariation":"testimonial","heading":"What People Are Saying","displayFilters":false,"displaySearch":false,"displayPerPage":false,"postsPerPage":9,"maxColumns":3,"paginationMode":"load-more"} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Blog Archive - Minimal (No Controls)","description":"Blog with no filters, no search, no per-page selector. Uses standard pagination mode. Tests minimal/empty configuration."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/archive {"blockVariation":"post","heading":"Blog","displayFilters":false,"displaySearch":false,"displayPerPage":false,"postsPerPage":9,"maxColumns":3,"paginationMode":"pagination"} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Blog Archive - Pagination Mode","description":"Blog with all controls enabled and standard pagination (not load-more). Tests Showing X to Y of Z, Prev/Next navigation."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/archive {"blockVariation":"post","heading":"Students in Their Own Words","description":"Browse our blog posts.","displayFilters":true,"displaySearch":true,"displayPerPage":true,"postsPerPage":9,"maxColumns":3,"paginationMode":"pagination"} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Blog Archive - Long Content (Edge Case)","description":"Tests overflow handling with extremely long heading and description text. Verifies text truncation/wrapping behavior."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/archive {"blockVariation":"post","eyebrow":"This Is An Intentionally Very Long Eyebrow Text To Test Overflow","heading":"This Is An Intentionally Very Long Heading Text That Exceeds One Hundred Characters to Test How the Layout Handles Overflow and Line Wrapping in the Archive Block Heading Area","description":"This is a very long description text that is intended to test how the archive block handles excessive content in the description area. It should gracefully wrap and not break the two-column layout. The description continues with more text to push well past the typical content length. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris.","buttons":[{"title":"A Very Long Button Label That Tests Overflow","url":"#"},{"title":"Second Button","url":"#"}],"displayFilters":true,"displaySearch":true,"displayPerPage":true,"postsPerPage":9,"maxColumns":3,"paginationMode":"load-more"} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Archive - Empty Optional Fields","description":"Tests shouldDisplay() behavior: no eyebrow, no heading, no description, no buttons. Only the filter bar and grid should render."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/archive {"blockVariation":"post","displayFilters":true,"displaySearch":true,"displayPerPage":true,"postsPerPage":9,"maxColumns":3,"paginationMode":"load-more"} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Resources Archive - With Eyebrow","description":"Tests eyebrow text rendering above the heading. Verifies the eyebrow is visible and properly styled in dark mode."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/archive {"blockVariation":"resource","eyebrow":"Student Resources","heading":"Find Resources That Support You","description":"Browse our collection of resources.","displayFilters":true,"displaySearch":false,"displayPerPage":true,"postsPerPage":9,"maxColumns":3,"paginationMode":"load-more"} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Blog Archive - Single Column","description":"Tests maxColumns=1 configuration. All cards should be full-width stacked vertically."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/archive {"blockVariation":"post","heading":"Single Column Blog","displayFilters":false,"displaySearch":false,"displayPerPage":false,"postsPerPage":3,"maxColumns":1,"paginationMode":"load-more"} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Resources Archive - Preset Filters (Filters Visible)","description":"Tests presetFilters attribute: audience filter pre-selected with 'students' on initial page load. Filters UI is shown so users can modify or clear the preset. URL params override presets."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/archive {"blockVariation":"resource","heading":"Preset Filtered Resources","description":"Resources pre-filtered by audience on load.","displayFilters":true,"displaySearch":false,"displayPerPage":true,"postsPerPage":9,"maxColumns":3,"paginationMode":"load-more","presetFilters":{"audience":["students"]}} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Resources Archive - Preset Filters (Filters Hidden)","description":"Tests presetFilters with displayFilters=false: preset filters still narrow the query results but no filter UI or active pill bar is shown. Users see a pre-filtered archive with no visible controls."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/archive {"blockVariation":"resource","heading":"Curated Resources","description":"A curated selection of resources.","displayFilters":false,"displaySearch":false,"displayPerPage":false,"postsPerPage":9,"maxColumns":3,"paginationMode":"load-more","presetFilters":{"audience":["students"]}} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->
